payload.text:
buatkan website Kurikulum SMK TANJUNG PRIOK 1 dengan modifikasi desain template seperti inihttps://id.wordpress.org/themes/education-zone/. web kurikulum  SMK TANJUNG PRIOK 1  merupakan pembeharuan yang sudah ada dimana terdapat fasilitas informasi sebagai berikut Struktur Situs Web:
Beranda (Home):
Pengumuman Terkait Kurikulum
Informasi Kontak Wakil Kurikulum
Pengumuman Ujian
Kurikulum:
Program Keahlian (Jurusan)
Struktur Kurikulum Setiap Jurusan
Jadwal Pelajaran
Silabus dan RPP
Muatan Lokal
Jadwal Ujian
Siswa:
Data Siswa
Pembayaran Siswa
Guru:
Materi Ajar
Informasi Lainnya:
Kalender Akademik (Terkait Kurikulum)
Penjelasan Tambahan:
Beranda (Home):
Pengumuman Ujian: Menampilkan pengumuman terkait jadwal ujian, peraturan ujian, dan informasi penting lainnya terkait ujian.
Kurikulum:
Jadwal Ujian: Menampilkan jadwal ujian untuk setiap kelas dan mata pelajaran. Jadwal ini akan terhubung langsung dengan Google Sheets, sehingga perubahan jadwal dapat langsung terlihat di situs web.
Siswa:
Data Siswa: Menampilkan informasi siswa, seperti nama, kelas, dan nomor induk siswa (NIS). Data ini akan diambil dari Google Sheets.
Pembayaran Siswa: Menampilkan informasi pembayaran siswa, seperti status pembayaran SPP atau biaya lainnya. Informasi ini juga akan terhubung dengan Google Sheets, sehingga dapat diperbarui secara real-time.
Penggunaan Google Sheets sebagai Database:
Google Sheets akan digunakan untuk menyimpan data jadwal ujian, data siswa, dan data pembayaran siswa.
Google Apps Script akan digunakan untuk menghubungkan Google Sheets dengan situs web.
Data dari Google Sheets akan ditampilkan di situs web menggunakan JavaScript.
Untuk keamanan data pembayaran, dan data siswa yang sensitif, harus di pastikan google sheet tidak dapat di akses secara umum.
Fitur Tambahan:
Fitur pencarian data siswa dan jadwal ujian.
Fitur filter untuk menampilkan data siswa berdasarkan kelas atau jurusan.
Fitur laporan pembayaran siswa.
Keuntungan Penggunaan Google Sheets:
Mudah digunakan dan diakses.
Gratis.
Dapat diakses secara real-time.
Memungkinkan kolaborasi.
hasil dari pembuatannya akan di pasang pada platform wordpress

**Planning the Website Structure**

I'm currently focused on the website's architecture. I've been considering the core sections: Home, Curriculum, Students, Teachers, and Other Info, to align with the user's focus on curriculum details for "SMK TANJUNG PRIOK 1". Also, I am using Education Zone WordPress Theme as a design reference.


**Designing Data Flow & UI**

My current focus is on the data integration and user interface. I'm exploring Google Sheets as the database using Google Apps Script. I will integrate features like exam announcements and schedules and simulate API calls for the user, as actual deployment is not possible. I'm designing specific sections, including a searchable student data area, a teachers' resource repository, and a curriculum section, with a mockup of Google Sheets integration. I plan to use React (18+), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.


**Outlining Component Architecture**

I'm now diving into the component structure and file organization. I am using the Education Zone WordPress Theme to inspire my design. I'm choosing a clean sans-serif font and considering components like cards, navigation bars, sticky CTAs, search bars, and filters. I'm setting up the base files: `metadata.json`, `index.html`, `index.tsx`, `App.tsx`, `types.ts`, and service files for both Google Sheets (mock implementation) and Gemini integration. The core layout includes components for the navbar, footer, hero section, student search, payment status, and data table.


**Defining the Website Sections**

I'm now concretizing the sections: Beranda, Kurikulum, Siswa, Guru, and Info Lainnya. 'Beranda' will feature a banner. 'Kurikulum' will be detailed by section (RPL, TKJ, etc.). 'Siswa' will have search-by-NIS and payment status. 'Guru' will feature file downloads. I am generating a single XML block for these elements and commencing with `index.tsx`, `index.html`, and `App.tsx`.

**Analyzing Website Changes** I'm currently focused on the SMK TANJUNG PRIOK 1 Curriculum website. My immediate priority is implementing the requested visual updates. I will be changing the color scheme to incorporate blue and green elements. Furthermore, I will integrate the specified logo from the Google Drive link. **Revising Site Content** I've just finished revising the content of the website. I have updated the "Wakil Kurikulum" to "Reni Widyastuti, M.Kom" and the email address. I've also updated the Majors to reflect the new program offerings. Furthermore, I have updated the logo and incorporated a new color scheme with blue and green, and have reflected this change in the footer. I updated the relevant types and services code to match these changes. **Adjusting Color Schemes** I'm now in the process of applying the new color scheme across the site. I'm focusing on the component-specific color changes within `Home.tsx`, `Curriculum.tsx`, `Students.tsx`, `Teachers.tsx`, and `AcademicCalendar.tsx`. I'm replacing the orange elements with a navy blue for the header and footer and an emerald green for buttons and accents. I'm also planning to modify the `types.ts` file and change the `Major` keys and values to ensure they reflect the overall redesign. Moreover, I'm updating the navbar to have a direct image link in the correct format for the logo. **Applying Aesthetic Updates** I'm now focusing on specific color adjustments. I'm updating the sidebar and table colors, and the search button and icon colors in `Students.tsx`. I'm going to refine the color palette, using a darker navy blue for the header/nav, emerald green for accents and buttons, and a soft blue/teal for secondary accents. I'm also ensuring the provided Google Drive link for the logo works in an `` tag, and will use textual fallback if the standard formats don't cooperate.

I'm currently integrating the "Form Izin Guru" into `Teachers.tsx`. The plan is to embed a Google Form using the link `https://forms.gle/FMQBg8EemZeRpwdT6`. I'm assessing the best way to present this form on the page without disrupting the current layout. I'm focusing on user experience, ensuring easy accessibility.


**Structuring Teacher Interface**

I'm now focusing on structuring the `Teachers.tsx` page for optimal presentation. I'm moving forward with a sidebar card for the permission form, mirroring the style of the "Tool Ajar Guru" card. This will maintain consistency and visual clarity. The plan is to add the new card with the permission form link embedded within, similar to the existing sidebar card. I'll define `permissionFormLink` as a constant. This provides good visibility as requested.

entries.description: Menambahkan menu Form Izin Guru di sidebar halaman Guru dengan link Google Forms yang disediakan.
